name: Stripped Tax-Exempt Bond Yield Election

eligibility.description: Applies to taxpayers who purchase tax-exempt bonds or coupons that have been separated from the original bond.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Purchasers of stripped tax-exempt obligations can elect to use the original yield to maturity rather than the coupon rate to determine the tax-exempt portion of OID.
